name: team-sub-worker
description: Simple sub-workflow for team tests — reads assignment, does work, writes output

steps.command: echo '## Worker Assignment' && cat assignment.json 2>/dev/null || echo '{"task": "default task"}'

steps.instruction: You are a test worker agent. Read your assignment from context (_assignment). Do the task described in the assignment (it will be something simple like writing a haiku). Write your result to your output file. Keep it brief — this is a test.
